section1.title: One-Time Services
section1.item1: If engagement has not started: 100% refund if requested within 30 days of payment.
section1.item2: If work has commenced: no refunds for services already delivered.

section2.title: Ongoing Services (Monthly Retainers)
section2.item2: Fees for the current billing period are non-refundable, and no refunds are provided for services already rendered.

section3.title: Exception (applies to all above services): Force Majeure / Medical Emergency
section3.description: No refunds after work has commenced, except where performance is prevented due to a Force Majeure event (as defined in the Terms of Service) or a verified medical emergency, evaluated case-by-case; where applicable, refunds (if any) will be limited to prepaid amounts for work not yet performed.
